positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for hydrocarbon_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~mixture(X0) | ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | chemical_compound(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    mixture(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) | contains_only_one_element(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~mixture(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) | contains_only_one_element(X0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    mixture(m)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) | mixture(X0)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~chemical_compound(m)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(m)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for hydrocarbon_neg
% SZS output start Proof for hydrocarbon_neg
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (alkane(X0) => hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) => chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. ! [X0] : (mixture(X0) => ((chemical_compound(X0) & contains_only_one_element(X0)) | (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~contains_only_one_element(X0)))) [input(axiom)]
8. mixture(m) [input(axiom)]
9. ~(alkane(m) & contains_carbon(m)) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~~(alkane(m) & contains_carbon(m)) [negated conjecture 9]
11. alkane(m) & contains_carbon(m) [flattening 10]
12. alkane(m) [pure predicate removal 11]
14. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
15. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
16. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
17. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
18. ! [X0] : (((chemical_compound(X0) & contains_only_one_element(X0)) | (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~contains_only_one_element(X0))) | ~mixture(X0)) [ennf transformation 6]
19. ! [X0] : ((chemical_compound(X0) & contains_only_one_element(X0)) | (~chemical_compound(X0) & ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) | ~mixture(X0)) [flattening 18]
21. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
22. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
23. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 16]
24. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 17]
26. ~mixture(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) | contains_only_one_element(X0) [cnf transformation 19]
31. mixture(m) [cnf transformation 8]
32. alkane(m) [cnf transformation 12]
33. hydrocarbon(m) [resolution 22,32]
34. organic_compound(m) [resolution 33,21]
35. chemical_compound(m) [resolution 34,23]
36. ~chemical_compound(m) | contains_only_one_element(m) [resolution 26,31]
37. contains_only_one_element(m) [forward subsumption resolution 36,35]
38. ~chemical_compound(m) [resolution 37,24]
39. $false [forward subsumption resolution 38,35]
% SZS output end Proof for hydrocarbon_neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
